title: Battle of Ylesia
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Ylesia}} {{Battle |prev=*[[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|Capture of the ''Helot's Shackle'']]''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' *[[Mission to Dellalt]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Toprawa]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |image= |name=Battle of Ylesia |conflict= |date=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]Though ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the battle to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], it also dates it as "months before the Battle of Yavin", placing it instead in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]; this placement is backed up by [[The Official Star Wars Fact File (2014)|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'']] and ''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' dating the ''[[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika]]''—which references the battle—as occurring in 1 BBY. |place=[[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] |result=Alliance victory |side1=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] *[[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler]] Fleet |side2=[[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Blevon]] *[[Bria Tharen]] |commanders2=*[[Teroenza]] † *[[Willum Kamaran]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Ylesian Dream|''Dream of Freedom'']] *[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] *[[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Liberator'']] *[[Red Hand Squadron]] **[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] **[[Jalus Nebl]] **[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] **[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] **[[Smuggler/Legends|Smugglers]] |forces2=*[[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolaser]] *[[Nova Force]] *Ylesian guards |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*At least one unit of Alliance infantry *[[Jarik Solo]] *[[Jalus Nebl]] |casual2=*Unknown, presumably heavy *[[Teroenza]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Hrrrgn?''"
"''Well that was a long time ago, I'm sure he's forgotten about that.|Chewbacca and Han Solo|{{Film|V}}}} The '''Battle of Ylesia''' was fought in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] against the [[t'landa Til]] and their [[Cult of The One and The All]] that was based on that world. ==History== The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] planned to attack the drug processing planet of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] in order to capture [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to fund its operations and free the prisoners with the prospect of gaining recruits from the liberated pilgrims. Ylesia was under the control of the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]]; as such, the Alliance received assistance from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], whose clan were mortal enemies of the Besadii. Jabba sent assassins to remove the t'landa til priests prior to invasion, in order to prevent them from using their empathic "Exultations" to slow the attackers. The Besadii themselves, however, had received aid from [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], including the assistance of a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] regiment known as [[Nova Force]], as well as a ground-based [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] placed in Colony One, which Jabba did not know about. The attack was carried out by the Alliance's [[Red Hand Squadron]] under the command of [[Bria Tharen]], aided by a smuggler fleet provided by Jabba which included notable [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] such as [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. The Squadron was divided up into nine units, one for each major colony on Ylesia. During the attack, at least one unit—lead by [[Jalus Nebl]] on board the [[Ylesian Dream|''Dream of Freedom'']]—was destroyed by the turbolaser. Additionally, [[Jarik Solo]] was killed in a running lightfight. However, the Nova Force units were quickly overrun and surrendered to the Rebels. Red Hand Squadron looted a lot of spice and [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from Ylesia before blowing up the spice-processing facilities and storage warehouses. Meanwhile, Tharen and Solo went to the treasure room of the High Priest [[Teroenza]]. There, Teroenza ambushed them but before he could fire at Han, the t'landa Til was killed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], who had been hired by [[Durga Besadii Tai]] on a [[Priority Bounty]] to enact revenge for the deaths of [[Aruk Besadii Aora]] and [[Kibbick]]. The smugglers who helped to raid Colony One, however, were betrayed by Tharen, who took their share of spice and treasure in order to help finance the Alliance, acting on misinterpreted orders from her superiors within the Alliance. ==Appearances== *''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}} *[[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 2|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 2]] {{Mo}} *''[[Scoundrels]]'' {{Ab|Scoundrels (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars Journal: Hero for Hire]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/97/indexp4.html|series=Aliens in the Empire|text=Part 2: To a Traitor Go the Spoils}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|Battle of Ylesia}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Ylesia (0 VSY) |es=Batalla de Ylesia (Guerra Civil Galáctica) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ylesia, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Ylesia]] [[Category:Events of the Galactic Civil War]]
